title: Decision Trees from Scratch
summary: Tree-based models using information gain / Gini impurity for splitting.
key_concepts: Greedy splitting: try all features and thresholds
Max depth, min samples as regularization
ml_connection: Foundation for Random Forest, XGBoost, and all ensemble methods. Still competitive for tabular data.
exercises: Implement a decision tree classifier from scratch using Gini impurity.
Implement a decision tree regressor using MSE as split criterion.
Show that an unpruned tree perfectly memorizes training data (overfits).
Visualize the decision boundary of a depth-3 tree on 2D data.
thinking_questions: Why are decision trees high variance? What makes them unstable?
What's the time complexity of fitting a decision tree?
